title: Hardcore Revive Mode
description: Enhances the hardcore, survival experience for servers!
body:
# JakeCCz' Revive Hardcore Players Mod!

![Logo/Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/209ded6ba5d78d7ad951749500ac18002fe1d4f7.png)

Have you ever wanted to play minecraft hardcore with friends but they're really bad at the game and keep on dying? Well luckily for you, I've created this Minecraft Mod to fix this very problem and make Hardcore Mode alot more fun for multiplayer, smps ect..

### So then...
## What have you changed?
Don't worry, it's not much... I am a personal fan of minecraft mods "that respect the source material". This means that this mod will fit perfectly into the vanilla experience without any major differences. Kind of like; "Why hasn't this already been added to the game???"

### Features
- Fully Dead Players can now be revived back into your minecraft world
> Alive Players must adventure out into the world in search of the Dead Player's player head, located at death position, and construct an ultimate summoning ritual in order to revive the Dead Player, add this player back into the world.

- Players now drop their respective player head upon death
> Whenever a player in a hardcore world dies, they will drop their player head at the position they died. This gives the other players in the world the opportunity to find it and revive this player. **NOTE: The player head item is extremely tangible and is easily lost by natural world events such as, burning in lava or a tnt explosion.**

- A new craftable player head that allows any Alive Player to get any Dead Player's player head
> Incase ever lost somehow.

## Reviving Players
![Ritual Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fb02c676277bb0896a396569a8e31305928cfc6.gif)

### How to build the Revival Structure
To build this structure you will need: **4 Blocks of Soul Sand**, **4 Wither Roses**, **4 Stair Blocks of any type**, **1 Fence Block of any type**, **1 Ore Block** and the head dropped by the player. The dimension of the entire structure is 3x3x3 blocks in any direction.

_Firstly, You must place your 4 blocks of soul sand on the four corners of the structure. Place your 4 wither roses on top of each soul sand block. Next, place your 4 stair blocks into the spaces between the soul sand blocks recently place. Then, **place your Ore Block in the middle of the current structure, whether it be diamond, iron, gold or emerald once it is able to activate a beacon it will work,** and place your desired fence block on top of it. Lastly, place your friend's player head onto the fence and they will be revived!_

![How to Build](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/488dafa9f216f8c746c8e29cee5ccebeabf86a63.gif)

### Structure Feature
_Once successful, lightning will strike the structure and your friend will appear back into existence. They will receive a small buff for 5 seconds._

![Successful Revival of the player.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb027934512fb5df7bfec6e344ce3934bb073bd2.png)


## Craftable Head Item
![Craftable Head Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6dfa7a696104481dae8ec98e278f2210f0980d2.png)

### Crafting The Item
_This item can be crafted using 4 obsidian, 2 ghast tears, 2 totems of undying and **any skull item as the centre piece.**_
![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fabd053e336fef5c117f8437d8f5eed564de4a4.png)

### Item Feature
_A custom menu opens upon item interaction. The menu displays a list of **every player in the server** with helpful statuses shown beside the players name. When a menu item is selected, you receive that respective player's head item. **Only when the player is dead you can select an option.**_
![Custom Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb269e73e31f232c8c1c121a0d4f248c88e909e0.png)

### Extra Features
Access Mod Config via command;
/hardcoreconfig < MODIFY:SET > < STRUCTURE:GAMERULE >

Wearing a Dead Player's Player Head grants your player;
Health Boost V (An extra row of hearts),
Resistance I,
Slowness I,
Nausea I (for 10 seconds),
once worn.

## Requirements
- [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

## Showcase
[Mod Showcase](https://youtu.be/NWCJBiSr4wU?si=1p8_GGYUkLHcI5AS)
